error_signature: Using the item method doesn’t work with pinned data
title: Error using item method with multiple email outputs
symptom: When processing multiple emails, n8n throws an error stating that the item method doesn’t work with pinned data. This occurs when trying to filter emails based on specific criteria.
applies_when: Using Gmail node to fetch multiple emails
Filtering emails based on criteria in a function node
not_this_if: Only processing a single email output
root_cause: The item method is designed to work with a single output, and when multiple outputs are generated, n8n cannot determine which item to reference. This leads to errors when trying to access properties of the emails.
fix_steps: Add a Filter node after the Function node and set the condition to {{$json.meetsCriteria}} == true.
Insert a Split In Batches node and set the Batch Size to 1.
In the Google Sheets node, use direct references for email details.
agent_instruction: Implement a Filter node and a Split In Batches node to handle multiple email outputs correctly.
